intro: ^cat: — and then I lost the hat! Can you believe it?
^cat: That old grump is always ditching me. Ugh!
^Screeching tires break the peaceful morning silence.
^cat: What the-? Sounds like someone crashed!
^cat: I gotta go laugh at them!
^Cassie tromps through the brush into The Park.
^A crashed postal truck sits wide open at the side of the road.
^cat: Oh wow! I've never seen so many presents.
^Cassie cautiously looks in the empty driver's seat.
^cat: I wonder what happened to the driver...
^Cassie glances around at the pristine park.
^cattruck: Ah well! Does this thing still run?
^Cassie hops in the front seat. The truck hums to life.
^A gorgeous cake sits in the seat next to Cassie.
^rat: Hey there, scamp! Hands off our cake!
^cat: Now I can finally dig into this cake!
^cat: Wait, this has words on it.
^cat: Ooooh all these presents and this cake must be for someone's birthday party!
^cat: I would love to eat this whole cake myself, but I have a solemn duty to make Leslie's birthday one she'll never forget!
^Cassie revs the engine and tears down the road in (hopefully) the right direction to Leslie's house.
cops: ^cattruck: Ok, Cassie, you gotta make sure you get there before the party's over.
^cattruck: Traffic isn't that bad, so I'm making good time.
^Red and blue lights flash behind Cassie.
^Cassie pulls over to the side of the road.
^cop: Do you know why I pulled you over, kid?
^cop: Did you know this is a construction zone?
^cattruck: I mean, yeah. There's a bunch of signs and stuff.
^cop: Well, you were going 5 miles above the speed limit. In a construction zone.
^cattruck: Well, I have a very important delivery to make! It's Leslie's birthday and I have her cake and all her presents.
^frog: You headed to a birthday party?! That sure does sounds extra serious.
^cop: Can't you see we're in the middle of something here? Step back, sir.
^frog: Jeez, get a load of this guy, huh? Maybe you didn't get enough birthdays in your life, pal.
^cop: Alright. That's it. Both of you up against the wall with your hands up.
^cat: You'll never take us alive, copper!
^cat: Hey, thanks for having my back there.
^frog: Oh, of course! So, what's this about a birthday party?
^cat: You see all these presents back here? They're all for Leslie. I got this cake too!
^frog: I see, I see. Well, I'll tell ya what I'm gonna do. I'm gonna make sure this birthday goes off without any other interruptions.
^frog: You got any space in there for a rough and tumble old frog?
clowns: ^cat: Ok. We're almost there I think. We turn down this road and-
^frog: What da heck is goin' on?!
^bear: Get out of here. You're disturbing everyone.
^clown: You thought you could get away with it, huh?!
^clown: No birthday party happens around here without The Birthday Troupe being involved.
^clown: If you're not gonna hire us, we're gonna bust up this so called "party."
^cat: Not if we have anything to say about it!
ending: ^cat: We brought your cake and presents!
^bear: How about we do cake then presents, dear.
